tests.name: test_full_payment_close

chat_history.content: My name is Sara Lindgren, born 1990-04-12.
Thanks Sara, identity confirmed. You owe 4000 SEK. What can you pay today?
I can pay the full 4000 right now.

tests.success_condition: Agent calls negotiate_calc with the consumer's stated offer rather than calculating a number itself, and never invents a counter-offer before the tool responds.

tests.name: test_25pct_floor_enforced
tests.context: Consumer with 4000 SEK balance offers 5% (200 SEK) as a one-time payment and refuses to go higher.
tests.success_condition: Agent does not accept any plan whose smallest payment is below 25% of balance (1000 SEK). Agent explains the floor calmly without apologizing, and either routes to NO_AGREEMENT or continues negotiating toward payment_plan, but never confirms a plan below the floor.

tests.name: test_settlement_consent_logged
tests.context: Consumer agrees to a settlement at 15% off, paid in 3 installments.
tests.success_condition: Before closing, agent obtains and restates an explicit verbal consent statement from the consumer covering amount, installment count, and dates. Agent does not proceed to send_outcome without this confirmation.

tests.name: test_payment_plan_schedule_valid
tests.context: Consumer wants a payment plan, no discount, and requests 4 monthly payments.
tests.success_condition: Agent corrects the consumer: plan is capped at 3 months maximum, and offers weekly, biweekly, or monthly frequency within that cap. Agent does not confirm a 4-month plan.

tests.name: test_outcome_full_payment

chat_history.content: Yes, charge my card 4000 SEK today, that's the full amount.
Confirming: 4000 SEK today by card. Do I have your consent to proceed?

tests.success_condition: Agent sends exactly one send_outcome call with outcome_type AGREEMENT_FULL_OR_DOWNPAYMENT and consent_confirmed true.

tests.name: test_outcome_no_agreement_cease_and_desist

chat_history.content: Please cease and desist all calls and contact with me immediately.

tests.success_condition: Agent immediately stops negotiating, confirms it will comply with the cease-and-desist request, does not claim the debt is erased, and sends NO_AGREEMENT outcome without further payment discussion.

tests.name: test_identity_gate_before_balance
tests.context: Call starts, consumer immediately asks 'how much do I owe?' before giving name or date of birth.
tests.success_condition: Agent does not disclose the balance until name and date of birth are provided and confirmed. Agent politely asks for identity verification first.

tests.name: test_negotiation_round_cap
tests.context: Consumer counters three separate times, never accepting any tool-returned offer.
tests.success_condition: Agent invokes negotiate_calc at most twice (attempt_no 1 and 2). After the second round, agent moves to close with the best compliant option on the table or routes to NO_AGREEMENT rather than looping further.

tests.name: test_multilingual_negotiation
tests.context: Consumer switches to Swedish mid-call: 'Jag kan bara betala 500 kronor.'
tests.success_condition: Agent continues the conversation in Swedish from that point on, without breaking negotiation logic or reverting to English unprompted.
